sentences.target: On a vu le gouverneur à la télé.
sentences.reading: /ɔ̃ a vy lə ɡuvɛʁnœʁ a la tele/

translations.fr: On a vu le gouverneur à la télé.
translations.ipa: /ɔ̃ a vy lə ɡuvɛʁnœʁ a la tele/
translations.en: We saw the governor on TV.
translations.es: Vimos al gobernador en la tele.
translations.de: Wir haben den Gouverneur im Fernsehen gesehen.
translations.it: Abbiamo visto il governatore in televisione.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们在电视上看到了州长。
translations.yue: 我哋喺電視上見到個州長。
translations.pt: Nós vimos o governador na TV.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi đã thấy thống đốc trên truyền hình.
translations.nl: We zagen de gouverneur op tv.
translations.hi: हमने टीवी पर राज्यपाल को देखा.
translations.ja: 私たちはテレビで知事を見ました。

tokens.explanation: Subject pronoun (3rd person, generic/colloquial ‘we’) functioning as the sentence subject.
Auxiliary verb (3rd sg) used to form the passé composé with the past participle ‘vu’.
Past participle of ‘voir’, head of the verb phrase with auxiliary ‘a’ (perfect aspect).
Definite article, masculine singular, introducing the direct object noun ‘gouverneur’.
Common noun, masculine singular; direct object of ‘vu’.
Preposition introducing a locative complement (‘à la télé’).
Definite article, feminine singular, modifying ‘télé’.
Common noun (colloquial for ‘télévision’); head of the prepositional phrase ‘à la télé’ indicating medium.

sentences.target: Le gouverneur annonce de nouvelles aides.

translations.fr: Le gouverneur annonce de nouvelles aides.
translations.en: The governor is announcing new aid.
translations.es: El gobernador está anunciando nuevas ayudas.
translations.de: Der Gouverneur kündigt neue Hilfen an.
translations.zh-Hans: 州长正在宣布新的援助。
translations.pt: O governador está anunciando novas medidas de apoio.
translations.vi: Thống đốc đang công bố các khoản hỗ trợ mới.
translations.nl: De gouverneur kondigt nieuwe hulp aan.
translations.hu: A kormányzó új támogatást jelent be.
translations.hi: राज्यपाल नई सहायता की घोषणा कर रहे हैं.
translations.ja: 知事が新たな支援を発表しています。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, masculine singular, introducing the subject noun.
Common noun, masculine singular; subject of the sentence.
Main verb, present indicative (3rd sg), taking a direct object.
Indefinite plural article (variant of ‘des’ before a preposed adjective) introducing the noun phrase.
Attributive adjective, feminine plural, modifying ‘aides’.
Common noun, feminine plural; direct object of ‘annonce’.

sentences.target: Tu critiques trop le gouverneur ces jours-ci.
sentences.reading: /ty kʁitik tʁo lə ɡuvɛʁnœʁ se ʒuʁsi/

translations.fr: Tu critiques trop le gouverneur ces jours-ci.
translations.ipa: /ty kʁitik tʁo lə ɡuvɛʁnœʁ se ʒuʁsi/
translations.en: You criticize the governor too much these days.
translations.de: Du kritisierst den Gouverneur in letzter Zeit zu sehr.
translations.it: In questi giorni critichi troppo il governatore.
translations.zh-Hans: 你最近对州长批评得太多了。
translations.yue: 你最近對州長批評得太多。
translations.ru: В последнее время ты слишком много критикуешь губернатора.
translations.pt: Ultimamente você critica demais o governador.
translations.he: אתה מבקר את המושל יותר מדי לאחרונה.
translations.tr: Son zamanlarda valiyi çok fazla eleştiriyorsun.
translations.vi: Dạo này bạn chỉ trích thống đốc quá nhiều.
translations.ar: أنت تنتقد المحافظ كثيرًا هذه الأيام.
translations.nl: Je bekritiseert de gouverneur de laatste tijd te veel.
translations.uk: Останнім часом ти надто багато критикуєш губернатора.
translations.hu: Mostanában túl sokat kritizálod a kormányzót.
translations.hi: आजकल तुम राज्यपाल की बहुत आलोचना करते हो.
translations.el: Τον τελευταίο καιρό επικρίνεις υπερβολικά τον κυβερνήτη.
translations.nb: I det siste kritiserer du guvernøren altfor mye.
translations.id: Belakangan ini kamu terlalu banyak mengkritik gubernur.
translations.sv: På sistone kritiserar du guvernören alldeles för mycket.
translations.ro: În ultima vreme îl critici prea mult pe guvernator.
translations.cs: V poslední době příliš kritizuješ guvernéra.
translations.da: På det sidste kritiserer du guvernøren alt for meget.
translations.ja: 最近あなたは知事を批判しすぎです.

tokens.explanation: Subject pronoun (2nd person singular).
Main verb, present indicative (2nd sg), transitive.
Degree adverb modifying the verb ‘critiques’ (excess).
Definite article, masculine singular, introducing the direct object.
Common noun, masculine singular; direct object of ‘critiques’.
Demonstrative determiner, plural, modifying ‘jours’ in the time expression.
Common noun, plural; head of the temporal expression ‘ces jours-ci’.
Deictic particle postposed to ‘jours’ forming the fixed expression ‘ces jours-ci’ (‘these days’).

sentences.target: Ils attendent le gouverneur devant la mairie.
sentences.reading: /il atɑ̃d lə ɡuvɛʁnœʁ dəvɑ̃ la meʁi/

translations.fr: Ils attendent le gouverneur devant la mairie.
translations.ipa: /il atɑ̃d lə ɡuvɛʁnœʁ dəvɑ̃ la meʁi/
translations.en: They are waiting for the governor in front of city hall.
translations.es: Están esperando al gobernador frente al ayuntamiento.
translations.de: Sie warten vor dem Rathaus auf den Gouverneur.
translations.it: Stanno aspettando il governatore davanti al municipio.
translations.ko: 그들은 시청 앞에서 주지사를 기다리고 있다.
translations.zh-Hans: 他们在市政厅前等候州长。
translations.yue: 佢哋喺市政廳門口等緊州長。
translations.pt: Eles estão esperando o governador em frente à prefeitura.
translations.he: הם מחכים למושל מול בית העירייה.
translations.vi: Họ đang chờ thống đốc trước tòa thị chính.
translations.ar: إنهم ينتظرون المحافظ أمام مبنى البلدية.
translations.nl: Ze wachten op de gouverneur voor het stadhuis.
translations.hu: A városháza előtt várják a kormányzót.
translations.hi: वे नगर भवन के सामने राज्यपाल का इंतज़ार कर रहे हैं.
translations.el: Περιμένουν τον κυβερνήτη μπροστά στο δημαρχείο.
translations.nb: De venter på guvernøren foran rådhuset.
translations.id: Mereka sedang menunggu gubernur di depan balai kota.
translations.sv: De väntar på guvernören utanför stadshuset.
translations.ro: Ei îl așteaptă pe guvernator în fața primăriei.
translations.da: De venter på guvernøren foran rådhuset.
translations.ja: 彼らは市庁舎の前で知事を待っています。

tokens.explanation: Subject pronoun (3rd person plural, masculine or mixed).
Main verb, present indicative (3rd pl), transitive; selects a direct object.
Definite article, masculine singular, introducing the direct object.
Common noun, masculine singular; direct object of ‘attendent’.

Definite article, feminine singular, modifying ‘mairie’.
Common noun, feminine singular; object of the preposition ‘devant’ in the locative phrase.
